package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for helper_or_utils_package_contains_domain_logic: Generic `helper`, `common`, or `utils` packages that host concrete domain decisions.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule076NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule076NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule076NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario076Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule076NegativeService, input Rule076NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
